languages.text: "Выжечь ксенозаразу священным пламенем Бога-Императора — что может быть благочестивее, {name}? Позвольте мне преподать зарковцам урок сожжения ереси".
"Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."
languages.original_text: "Выжечь ксенозаразу священным пламенем Бога-Императора — что может быть благочестивее, {name}? Позвольте мне преподать зарковцам урок сожжения ереси".

traits.locale_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."
"Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."
"Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

languages.text: 「異教の汚染を神帝の聖なる炎で焼き尽くす。これほど正義にかなう行為はないだろう、{name}。ザルコビアンに異端を焼き尽くすことを教えるがいい」
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「異教の汚染を神帝の聖なる炎で焼き尽くす。これほど正義にかなう行為はないだろう、{name}。ザルコビアンに異端を焼き尽くすことを教えるがいい。」

languages.text: «No hay nada más justo que carbonizar la peste xenos con la llama sagrada del Dios Emperador, {name}. Demos a esos zarkovianos una lección sobre cómo tratar con la herejía».
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: «No hay nada más justo que carbonizar la peste xenos con la llama sagrada del Dios Emperador, {name}. Demos a esos zarkovianos una lección sobre cómo tratar con la herejía».

languages.text: “以神皇圣焰，焚尽异形污秽——还有比这更正义的事业吗，{name}？请允许我为扎尔科夫人演示如何彻底焚尽异端。”
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: “以神皇圣焰，焚尽异形污秽——还有比这更正义的事业吗，{name}？请允许我为扎尔科夫人演示如何彻底焚尽异端。”

languages.text: "Die Xenopest mit der heiligen Flamme des Gottimperators abzufackeln ... was könnte rechtschaffener sein, {name}? Lasst mich den Zarkovianern zeigen, wie man Ketzerei ausbrennt."
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Die Xenopest mit der heiligen Flamme des Gottimperators abzufackeln ... was könnte rechtschaffener sein, {name}? Lasst mich den Zarkovianern zeigen, wie man Ketzerei ausbrennt."

languages.text: "Zenoyangısını Tanrı İmparator'un kutsal ateşiyle yakıp kül etmek... Bundan daha doğru ne olabilir? İzin verin Zarkovlulara kâfirliği yakıp yok etme konusunda ders vereyim."
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Zenoyangısını Tanrı İmparator'un kutsal ateşiyle yakıp kül etmek... Bundan daha doğru ne olabilir? İzin verin Zarkovlulara kâfirliği yakıp yok etme konusunda ders vereyim."

languages.text: « Déchaîner les flammes sacrées de l'Empereur-Dieu sur le fléau xénos... Qu'y a-t-il de plus pieux, {name} ? Permettez-moi d'initier les Zarkoviens à la consumation de l'hérésie. »
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: « Déchaîner les flammes sacrées de l'Empereur-Dieu sur le fléau xénos... Qu'y a-t-il de plus pieux, {name} ? Permettez-moi d'initier les Zarkoviens à la consumation de l'hérésie. »
